text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Sakura Bakushin O and I decide
to get some food before heading back.
However...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! There's actually a place I wanna take you
to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, I let Sakura Bakushin O take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to this! The inn's premium
course is famous for its all-you-can-eat crab
dishes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh ho, it looks like you've become all fidgety
with excitement yourself!
choice_data_list:
N-no... I was just wondering if they'll take
credit...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: He he he... don't worry! You're my VIP today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The other day I came across an elderly lady
curled up in pain, and so I took her to the
hospital.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It turns out she was the owner of this place!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As a thank-you, she invited me to visit and said I
could bring someone important along with me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So don't worry! Just enjoy yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved by Sakura Bakushin O's words, I relax as I
wait for each dish to come out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hooo! It's SO good! Each dish tastes so high-class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How is it? Delicious, right? Isn't the flavor
life-changing?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Onto the main dish! Is what I wanna say,
but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's one of those fancy crabs served up in its
entirety! And... I'm not good at opening up
seafood that's presented like this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Like, the meat is totally inaccessible! Hiding
inside that spiky shell! How cowardly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...True, carefully taking the shell off the crab is
troublesome work for a hasty girl like her.
choice_data_list: It's easy to do with the right tools.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Perseverance! That makes sense! Perseverance
helps overcome all obstacles!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Perseverance is a model student's specialty!
Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hnnnnngg! Bakushin perseveeerance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SNAP! CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... I somehow managed to break open the
shell.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh! Yes, this is the perseverance of a model student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Here you go! While you're eating, I'll free another
crab from its shell!
choice_data_list: I can do it myself though?
I can do it myself though?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! I decided I want you to thoroughly enjoy
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stirred by Sakura Bakushin O's offer, I decide to
accept it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...The broken shards of crab shell do hurt my
tongue, but eating together is a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! That meal was so good!
choice_data_list: Thank you for letting me have my fill.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My pleasure! It was thanks to your words that I
was able to persevere and defeat those crabs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You always motivate me like that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you were one of my classmates, I would scout
you to be the vice class rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! This is how you must've felt when you scouted
me, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I see, I see! No need to get bashful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The banquet leaves us with full stomachs and full
hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pass her a special spoon for eating crab.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh? To think such a durable crab can be
dismantled so easily!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Leave the de-shelling to me! Please sit
back and enjoy the meat, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I can do it myself though?
I can do it myself though?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! I decided I want you to thoroughly enjoy
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stirred by Sakura Bakushin O's offer, I decide to
accept it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Munch, munch! Ah, the next crab has arrived! And
what a bulky boy! BAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her moving swiftly and dexterously to
dismantle the crabs, we wind up consuming a
large amount of food, but we do so happily...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was some good food!
choice_data_list: Thank you for letting me have my fill.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm the one who should be thankful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I've gained another
Bakushin-related skill!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Please teach me lots of things from now on! And...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As someone important to me, help make my
Bakushin bigger and better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The banquet leaves us with full stomachs and
refreshed spirits.
